ideation: This animation sequence simulates the anticipation and excitement of an oncoming taxi. The arms will mimic the feeling of reaching out or signaling for a ride.  The sequence will start with arms relaxed, then move to a reaching motion, followed by a slight pause before returning to a relaxed state. This uses the two joints in the shoulder, creating a smooth yet expressive movement.  The final pose will be one of relaxed anticipation, after the taxi has arrived.

frames.beat: arms hang down, waiting for the cab
both arms reach out, signaling for a ride
the arms extend further, eager to get in
arms relax, the taxi has arrived
